round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent had no evidence in R1 and none in R2; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Acknowledged other agents' findings (Botanics, Meta) to refine the specific region (Piedmont/Coastal Plain) but maintained the same top candidate.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Explicitly cited Landscape and Meta agents to corroborate the US location, strengthening the confidence.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Shifted confidence away from Canada by integrating botanical and meta evidence, showing synthesis.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Integrated regulatory and botanical evidence to narrow the location to the Southeastern US.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence, identifying the specific diagnostic value of the Loblolly pine (Pinus taeda) and the utility pole configuration to definitively rule out Canada and confirm the Southeastern US.
